description: This pipeline lists all subfolders in a given folder and then uses these subfolder paths to create annotations. The main steps involve listing subfolders, creating annotations from the subfolder paths.

9ed77cbf-f248-474f-921a-58c3994f68f6.name: path-to-annotation-simple
9ed77cbf-f248-474f-921a-58c3994f68f6.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.
